title: Sales Manager Vacancy at DLF - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at DLF - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at DLF are looking for an experienced Sales Manager based out of Agra. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About DLF:
DLF is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DLF!
